slug.description: 2-3 word human-readable identifier, lowercase hyphenated. Set once on v1. Example: deploy-rollback, expense-approvals

idea.description: The verbatim original idea as provided by the user. Carried forward unchanged on all versions.

description.description: What this direction is and what it focuses on.

tradeoffs.description: What is gained and what is given up by choosing this direction. Why it was or was not chosen.

alternatives.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

direction.description: A clear, specific statement of the chosen direction.

rationale.description: Why this direction was chosen over the alternatives. Must reference the alternatives explicitly.

competitive_scan.description: Findings from the competitive WebSearch. What exists, how it addresses the problem, and what gap remains.

scope.description: Estimated overall scope of the chosen direction.

decomposition_needed.description: Whether the chosen direction is large enough to require decomposition into independent subsystems. Subsystem identification is the Domain Agent's responsibility.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions the Brainstormer could not settle. These become the Product Owner's first agenda items. Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

decision_log_entry.description: Entry to append to the artifact's decision_log. Omit on v1 if nothing meaningful to record yet.

summary.description: Plain-language description of what was decided or changed in this version.

changed_fields.description: Top-level content fields that changed in this version. Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.
